name: Mace of Disruption
description:
When you hit a Fiend or an Undead with this magic weapon, that creature takes an extra {@damage 2d6} Radiant damage. If the target has 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or be destroyed. On a successful save, the creature has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of your next turn.
